name: MCP Web Research
description: Fetch a URL via the MCP fetch server, summarize with AI, save and notify

config.userPrompt:
You are a research analyst. Summarize the fetched web content below into a structured brief.

## Summary
2-3 sentence overview of the page and its main content.

## Key Points
5-8 bullet points of the most important information.

## Notable Items
Anything surprising, important, or worth acting on.

## Source
Note the URL and date if visible in the content.

Be factual and concise. Only include what's in the content.

CONTENT:
{{INPUT}}
